news.summary:
Former Malaysian transport minister Ling Liong Sik died on Saturday. He was 82.

news.headline: Afghanistan earthquake kills eight members of same family
news.summary: The household's only survivor was a young boy who was injured in the tremor.

news.headline: Hongkongers crossing border for Easter break wowed by new Shenzhen tech museum
news.summary:
Hongkongers crossed the border into Shenzhen in droves on the second day of the Easter holiday on Saturday, drawn by a wider range of bargain-priced shopping, dining and entertainment options, as well as new landmark attractions including a futuristic tech museum.
